title: Import Candidate Review Hardening
objective: Harden the read-only Project Miner Temp Power import-candidate PM review route with source stat freshness, warning filters, browser-only JSON export, and local PM questions draft while preserving no-mutation/no-import authority.
active_role: Delegated Technical Repo Authority / PM Runtime Product Coordinator / UI Executor
orchestration_inputs: The coordinator recommended PM Lane 034 as local review hardening before any import mutation.
An internal read-only sidecar scout independently recommended source freshness, warning filters, JSON export, and local-only PM notes/questions.
The coordinator retained final write ownership and integrated the sidecar recommendation into one bounded tranche.
constrained_outputs: Add source stat freshness metadata to the read-only import candidate using path, size, modified time, availability, and aggregate fingerprint.
Add warning severity and warning-code filters without additional reads or mutation calls.
Add browser-only JSON export containing the current candidate and local PM draft notes.
Add local-only PM questions draft retained in browser storage.
Extend focused backend and browser tests to prove read-only behavior, filters, export, local draft retention, and zero mutation requests.
Update PM operating docs and project status.
validation_steps: corepack pnpm exec playwright test tests/browser-shell.pm-import-candidate.smoke.spec.ts (from apps/operations-web)
Browser plugin open of http://host.docker.internal:3031/pm-review/import-candidate against current local API/UI pair
validation_results: Focused mutation-seam import-candidate tests passed: 2 passed.
Focused Playwright smoke passed: 1 passed after tightening a duplicate warning-code assertion.
Browser plugin opened the route through host.docker.internal:3031 against a current local API/UI pair.
handoff_target: Delegated Technical Repo Authority / PM Runtime Product Coordinator
sql_permission_note: Packet 2026-05-15-pm-lane-034 does not authorize SQL writes, schema migration, live data mutation, production import, workbook writeback, macro execution, Render deployment, Vercel promotion, auth widening, ingress widening, package dependency addition, approval persistence, server-side PM note persistence, candidate edit persistence, import mutation, schedule mutation, assignment mutation, status mutation, or autonomous AI business-state mutation.
